phase303_anchored_munda_sa.interpretation: With 605 anchors pinned, Dravidian LM matches 58.7% of anchored bigrams vs Munda 34.5% (delta=+24.2%). Dravidian anchors fit the Dravidian LM better — confirms language-specific signal.

phase304_allograph_validation.verdict: 21 allograph signs (3.5%). Of these, 17 have DEDR entries, 5 have SA support, 2 have Elamite corroboration. Independent support rate: 114%.

key_agreements: Fish as compound-only (supports our 0/140 isolated finding)
key_contradictions: Non-phonetic interpretation contradicts our SA-based phonetic readings

key_agreements: M176 as classifier/suffix (we read M176=an/aṇ masculine suffix)
key_contradictions: Semiotic vs phonetic interpretation of M176

phase305_cross_researcher.verdict: Compared against 4 competing frameworks. 4 points of agreement, 6 contradictions. Key validation: fish-sign compound-only finding (0/140) supported by Mukhopadhyay. Key challenge: semasiographic vs phonetic debate remains unresolved by either side.

phase306_semantic_coherence.verdict: 1670/1670 seals (100%) fully decoded. Semantic types: {'OTHER': 1234, 'SUFFIX_ONLY': 195, 'ANIMAL_GUILD': 153, 'TITLE_FORMULA': 88}. ANIMAL_GUILD dominance (153/1670) consistent with guild-identity model.

phase307_dedr_coverage.verdict: 496/605 (82.0%) anchors have DEDR citations. 109 without. 39 DEDR entries shared by multiple signs (expected for allographs/variants).
